meta.title: Khalil Drissi - Software Developer
meta.description: Software developer building across web, mobile, desktop, and systems. Built for global collaboration.

intro.name: Khalil Drissi
intro.title: Software Developer
intro.whatIDoDesc: I turn complex things into their simplest form.

list.name: Backlinks Backer
list.desc: Automated backlink builder and outreach tool that finds, qualifies, and tracks link opportunities for SEO.

list.name: Server Guard Agent
list.desc: Autonomous monitoring agent that watches servers, triages incidents, and responds to threats in real time.

list.name: Pagerank
list.desc: SEO audit tool for developers — Lighthouse + Core Web Vitals in one dashboard

list.name: Capsule EDMS
list.desc: Electronic document management system for storing, versioning, and securely sharing business documents.

list.label: GSAP Scroll Animations
list.title: Mastering Scroll Animations with GSAP ScrollTrigger
list.excerpt: A deep dive into creating buttery-smooth scroll-driven animations with GSAP's ScrollTrigger plugin — from basic reveals to complex parallax effects.

list.label: Performant Dashboards
list.title: Building Performant Real-Time Dashboards
list.excerpt: Strategies for building dashboards that handle thousands of data points without dropping frames — virtualization, WebSockets, and smart re-rendering.

list.label: C++ for Web Devs
list.title: Modern C++ Patterns for Web Developers
list.excerpt: How concepts from modern C++ like RAII, move semantics, and compile-time computation can improve how you think about JavaScript and TypeScript.

list.label: Scalable Design Systems
list.title: Design Systems That Scale: From Tokens to Components
list.excerpt: Building a design system from scratch — design tokens, component APIs, documentation, and the tooling that ties it all together.

list.label: Edge Computing
list.title: Edge Computing with Cloudflare Workers and Durable Objects
list.excerpt: Deploying stateful applications at the edge — real-time collaboration, rate limiting, and session management without a traditional backend.

list.label: Wasm in Production
list.title: WebAssembly in Production: Lessons Learned
list.excerpt: Practical experiences integrating Wasm modules into production web apps — image processing, crypto, and computational geometry at near-native speed.

list.label: Art of Code Review
list.title: The Art of Code Review: Beyond Syntax Checking
list.excerpt: How to give reviews that improve architecture, mentorship, and team velocity — not just catch bugs.

statement.text: Making software tools, AI models, and automation systems. Focused on {rotate1} and {rotate2}, building {rotate3}.

projects.title: Cercle Immobilier
projects.subtitle: ERP — Real Estate CRM
projects.desc: Real-estate management platform covering the full sales pipeline — property inventory, contacts, projects, prospects, sales, payment plans, invoicing, and P&L reporting. Bilingual French/Arabic with map-based property listings.

projects.title: ShopFlow
projects.subtitle: Product — Visual Automation Builder
projects.desc: A visual automation system purpose-built for Shopify stores — a node-based workflow builder with triggers, filters, and actions to automate store operations. Designed for store owners in the AI era.

projects.title: Virtus Operandi
projects.subtitle: AI — Manufacturing Operations
projects.desc: AI-powered assistants for DELMIA Apriso, helping developers build faster and operators work smarter across the manufacturing operations (MOM) ecosystem. Built with RAG and multi-tenant SDKs.

projects.title: Kiloctet ERP
projects.subtitle: ERP — Transport & Fleet Management
projects.desc: Full ERP for transport and logistics businesses — invoicing, vehicle fleet, fuel tracking, VAT (TVA), payments, expenses, and HR in one dashboard. Multi-currency with Arabic and French support.

projects.title: ShopifyGMC
projects.subtitle: SaaS — Shopify E-commerce Tool
projects.desc: Monitoring SaaS that catches Google Merchant Center suspensions before they take Shopify stores off Google Shopping. Free 90-second audit, then continuous feed and disapproval monitoring.

projects.title: SmartShop Automation
projects.subtitle: Product — E-commerce Automation
projects.desc: Guides and ready-to-import n8n workflows that automate Shopify operations — revenue dashboards, social posting, SEO content, and accounting. No-code automation for store owners.

about.name: Khalil Drissi
bio: I'm a senior software developer building products across web, mobile, desktop, and systems programming for clients worldwide.

My work spans the entire stack and platform spectrum — from React and Next.js frontends to Node.js and Python backends, mobile apps with React Native, Flutter, and native iOS/Android, Electron desktop tools, game development with Godot, systems-level work with Rust, Go, and C++, AI/ML pipelines, and blockchain/Web3 applications.
When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new tools, contributing to open source, or mentoring aspiring developers.

details.label: Interests
details.value:
Creative Coding · AI/ML
Open Source · Design Systems

chat.greeting: Hey! I'm Khalil's AI assistant. Ask me anything about his work, experience, tech stack, or availability. I'm here to help!

responses.stack: Khalil works across the full spectrum — React, Next.js, and TypeScript on the frontend; Node.js, Python, and PostgreSQL on the backend; React Native, Flutter, and native iOS/Android for mobile; Electron for desktop; Godot for game dev; Rust/Go/C++ for systems programming; plus AI/ML and blockchain/Web3.
responses.experience: Khalil is a senior developer who has delivered 15+ projects for startups, agencies, and brands. He's worked across fintech, e-commerce, health tech, and SaaS industries.
responses.available: Yes! Khalil is currently available for new projects. He collaborates with clients globally. You can schedule a discovery call or request a cost estimate.
responses.pricing: Khalil's rates depend on the project scope and complexity. For an accurate estimate, it's best to schedule a discovery call or send a project brief to khalil@drissi.org.
responses.contact: You can reach Khalil via email at khalil@drissi.org, or connect on LinkedIn, GitHub, or Twitter. He typically responds within 24 hours.
responses.default: Great question! For detailed inquiries, the best way to get a thorough answer is to reach out directly at khalil@drissi.org or schedule a call. Khalil is always happy to chat about potential projects.
